name_cn:
💰. In Stock Chanel 24A Kelly
Size: 19*13*7cm
24A Kelly Burgundy, it's really cute to me. This season's most requested, another vintage fashion cycle bag. The 1997 Kelly returns with a chain this time, vintage yet stylish. The 'King of Bags' lives up to its name. Handheld or crossbody, it's all good. Very lightweight with a rich vintage taste, just right. It's a '23k Bag King' worthy of the title. The large size isn't too big; it fits an iPhone Pro but is a bit tight for the Max. Exquisite but not bulky. The interior capacity is sufficient for daily use. The more you look at it, the more you like it. Can't resist the girly heart. Comparison of the two sizes' appeal.
Style No. AS4416
